---
title: "Projects"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Index"
page-layout: full
---

Here is a collection of my recent work. Use the tabs below to filter by category.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## 30dmc
{{< include projects/analysis-02.qmd >}}

:::
